name: Intelligent Standard Assessment
description: Comprehensive default recon: full TCP port scan (aggressive timing, so this stays practical as a one-click default), service/version detection, OS detection, and NSE's own safe/default script categories (banners, HTTP headers, TLS certificate/cipher info, SSH algorithms, SMB protocol/signing, DNS/SNMP info where applicable) — never intrusive, exploit, brute-force, or DoS scripts. Recommended for normal assessments and what the Assessment Pipeline uses for its own recon stage.
